name: coTfsLoadDeviceDescription
title: coTfsLoadDeviceDescription
syntax: long coTfsLoadDeviceDescription( dword nodeId, char fileName[] );
description: This function reads an EDS, DCF or XML file. This allows the interpretation of index and sub index during SDO accesses, so that object names can be displayed in plain text.
The object names can be deleted with coTfsClearObjectName.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Node-ID of the relevant node or 0 if all nodes are used.
